name: Visitor Guide
tagline: Which concerts and events are open to visitors — and what you need to book to be there
vibe: You're booking independently. Use this to decide which parts of the tour to join, then let the app tell you what to book.
highlights: Concert #2 — Château de La Tour d'Aigues (Jul 31)

days.label: Departure Day — Monday, July 27
days.theme: Performers fly out — visitors travel independently

segments.activity: Performers depart JFK on AA0198 at 6:59 PM
segments.notes: Visitors arrange their own flights. Consider flying into Geneva (GVA) or Lyon (LYS) to meet the group in Chamonix on Jul 28–29.

days.label: Day 1 — Tuesday, July 28
days.theme: Group arrives in Chamonix — Rehearsal day

segments.activity: Group settles into Chamonix — rehearsal in evening
segments.notes: Rehearsal is closed to visitors. Good day to arrive and explore Chamonix independently.

segments.activity: Explore Chamonix — cable cars, hiking, town
segments.notes: Great day to arrive and get your bearings. Book Aiguille du Midi cable car now for tomorrow.

days.label: Day 2 — Wednesday, July 29 ★ Concert #1
days.theme: Aiguille du Midi + Concert at Martigny

segments.activity: Aiguille du Midi cable car — join the group
segments.notes: Visitors can join the group for the morning cable car visit. Book tickets in advance — sells out in summer.

segments.activity: Free time in Martigny before the concert
segments.notes: Meet the group in Martigny. The town has a Roman amphitheatre and the Fondation Gianadda art museum worth visiting.

segments.activity: ★ Concert #1 — Place Centrale, Martigny, Switzerland
segments.notes: Free open-air public concert. Just show up. Bring a light jacket — evenings cool in the Alps.

days.notes: Visitors staying in Chamonix: return independently after the concert (~40 min drive/train to Chamonix). Or stay overnight in Martigny.

days.label: Day 3 — Thursday, July 30
days.theme: Group transfers to Arles — visitors travel south

segments.activity: Pont du Gard — recommended stop en route to Provence
segments.notes: The group bus stops here. Visitors driving or taking the train south should try to include it — extraordinary Roman monument.

segments.activity: Arrive in Arles — group settles in
segments.notes: Book your hotel in Arles for Jul 30–Aug 2 if attending Concerts #2 and #3.

days.label: Day 4 — Friday, July 31 ★ Concert #2
days.theme: Les Baux + Concert at Château de La Tour d'Aigues

segments.activity: Les Baux-de-Provence — join the group for guided tour
segments.notes: Visitors can join the group here. Magnificent medieval village — one of the best in France.

segments.activity: Lunch in Les Baux — on your own or with the group
★ Concert #2 — Château de La Tour d'Aigues
segments.notes: Tickets may be required — check the venue website closer to the date. A stunning outdoor concert in a Renaissance château.

segments.activity: Beach day at Le Grau-du-Roi — visitors welcome
segments.notes: The whole group heads to the beach. Great opportunity to spend a relaxed day with the performers.

segments.activity: Free time in Arles — Roman Arena, Van Gogh sites, shopping

days.label: Day 6 — Sunday, August 2 ★ Concert #3

segments.activity: Visit Pont Saint-Bénézet with the group
Palais des Papes — join the group
segments.notes: One of the great medieval monuments in Europe. Book tickets in advance.

segments.activity: ★ Concert #3 — Avignon or Aix-en-Provence
segments.notes: Free open-air public concert. Venue TBC — Place de l'Horloge (Avignon) or Place de l'Église de la Madeleine (Aix-en-Provence).

days.notes: Last night in Arles. Group moves to Nice tomorrow.

segments.activity: Optional: Marseille O Beach lunch stop
segments.notes: The group bus stops here for lunch. Visitors can meet them or travel independently.

segments.activity: Optional: Saint-Paul-de-Vence afternoon
segments.notes: Highly recommended detour — stunning medieval hill village just above Nice.

segments.activity: Arrive Nice — dinner on own in groups
segments.notes: Book your Nice hotel for Aug 3–5. The Old Town has excellent restaurants.

segments.activity: Guided tour of Old Nice + Cours Saleya Market — join the group
segments.notes: The best morning in Nice. Join the group for the guided tour or explore the market independently.

segments.activity: Dinner on own — last evening on the Riviera
★ Concert #4 — Nice Riviera (final concert of the tour)
segments.notes: Free open-air public concert. The final performance. Venue TBC — Nice Bandstand, Antibes, or St-Raphaël.

days.label: Day 9 — Wednesday, August 5
days.theme: Group departs for Italy — visitors head home

segments.activity: Group departs Nice for Italy — farewell to performers
segments.notes: The group has a private farewell dinner in Italy tonight. Visitors fly home from Nice (NCE) or continue exploring independently.

segments.activity: Visitors: last day on the Riviera — Nice, Antibes, Monaco nearby
segments.notes: Great day for Monaco (~30 min), Antibes (20 min), or a final Promenade des Anglais walk before your flight home.
